task: Move bowl from the towel to the left side of the counter.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A stainless steel bowl rests on a yellow towel on a wooden counter. A gas stove is to the right, and a toaster is in the background. The bowl is metallic and has a circular rim. STRATEGY - First, grasp the bowl by its rim to lift it. Then, transport it to the left side of the counter, placing it on the wooden surface. Failure modes include dropping the bowl or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bowl at its rim for a stable grip; Step 2 grasp the rim to lift; Step 3 transport to the left; Step 4 place on the counter surface.

Goal: on(bowl, counter); stable(bowl)
Scene: bowl, towel, counter, stove
Step 1: reach(bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the stainless steel bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the stainless steel bowl
  contact: holding(bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(bowl)
Step 3: transport(bowl -> left_side_of_counter)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the left side of the counter
  spatial: above(bowl, left_side_of_counter, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(bowl)
  done_when: above(bowl, left_side_of_counter, 0.05)
Step 4: place(bowl -> left_side_of_counter)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the left side of the counter
  contact: surface_contact(bowl, counter) [completion]; released(bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(bowl, counter) AND released(bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the stainless steel bowl
the rim of the stainless steel bowl
an empty area on the left side of the counter
an empty area on the left side of the counter
